plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context (name, market, customers, niche, objectives). Ships with the `wzrdx company` command.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.notes: Shared with Operações: persistent tasks, workplace memory, dashboard, /start, /update. The EA uses this for recurring reminders, meeting agendas, and the PT deadlines tracker.

plugins.name: gmail-mcp
plugins.notes: Connect when real e-mail wiring is ready; least-privilege scopes (read + draft only; no send without explicit approval). Enables the AI e-mail delegation path (Dan Martell: n8n + agent).

plugins.name: gcal-mcp
plugins.notes: Connect when calendar wiring is ready; least-privilege scopes (read + create events; no delete without explicit approval). Enables Reverse Calendar Booking automation and Preloaded Year skeleton generation.
